title: Clean View mod
description: A lightweight, "vanilla+" utility mod that hides potion particles from the first-person view to keep your screen clear while maintaining visibility in third-person mode.
body:
Have you ever felt that potion effects get in the way of your adventure? Large swirls and bubbles can clutter your screen, especially during intense combat or building sessions. CleanView solves this issue elegantly and simply.

Unlike other mods that disable particles entirely, CleanView works intelligently:

First-Person Clarity: Your view remains perfectly clear while playing in first-person mode. No more distracting spirals in your face.

Visual Feedback: Switch to third-person view (F5), and all particles will still be visible on your character. You can still see your effects and look cool.

Performance Friendly: Built with optimized Mixins, the mod has zero impact on your FPS.

Zero Configuration: No menus, no complex config files. Just drag, drop, and play.
